# daytona_snapshot (Data Source)

Reads a Daytona snapshot by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_snapshot" "example" {
  id = "snapshot-id"
}

output "daytona_snapshot_state" {
  value = data.daytona_snapshot.example.state
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Daytona snapshot ID.

### Read-Only

- `cpu` (Number) CPU cores allocated to sandboxes created from this snapshot.
- `created_at` (String) Snapshot creation timestamp.
- `disk` (Number) Disk allocated to sandboxes created from this snapshot in GB.
- `entrypoint` (List of String) Entrypoint command for the snapshot.
- `error_reason` (String) Snapshot error reason, when available.
- `general` (Boolean) Whether this is a general Daytona snapshot.
- `gpu` (Number) GPU units allocated to sandboxes created from this snapshot.
- `image_name` (String) Image name used to build the snapshot.
- `memory` (Number) Memory allocated to sandboxes created from this snapshot in GB.
- `name` (String) Snapshot name.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID that owns the snapshot.
- `ref` (String) Snapshot reference.
- `region_ids` (List of String) Region IDs where the snapshot is available.
- `sandbox_class` (String) Sandbox class for sandboxes created from this snapshot.
- `size` (String) Snapshot size, when available.
- `state` (String) Current snapshot state.
- `updated_at` (String) Snapshot update timestamp.
